pi_items.source: Data files and generation scripts are entirely missing from the environment
Data files and generation scripts are entirely missing from the environment
Task description specifies a Colorado foothills project and the task is inherently synthetic

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for topocal_env merge_mixed_format_surveys task by confirming that the explicitly required output paths (combined_points.csv and combined_site.top) exactly match the task description instructions. I also discovered that the task is critically defective because setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, and verifier.py are entirely missing from the environment. As a result, the prerequisite input data (western_tract.csv and eastern_tract.csv) are never generated or staged, rendering the task unscorable and impossible to execute correctly.
